subject: [PATCH v3 1/4] mm: add NR_DONTCACHE_DIRTY node page counter

2026-04-26.patch_summary: This patch adds a new per-node page counter called NR_DONTCACHE_DIRTY to track the number of dirty pages that have been dirtied via RWF_DONTCACHE writes, also known as dropbehind writes. The counter is incremented when a folio is dirtied with the dropbehind flag set and decremented when the flag is cleared or the folio is cleaned. This information will be visible in /proc/vmstat and used by the writeback flusher to determine how many pages to write back during expedited writeback for IOCB_DONTCACHE writes, without flushing all dirty pages.
